description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a complex, multi-hipped roof and a prominent front-facing balcony above the main entrance. The facade features a combination of large bay windows, smaller rectangular windows, and a covered porch supported by two columns. The exterior is finished in dark green with white trim, and there is an attached garage with a flat roof and glass-panel walls on one side. The rear of the house includes additional balconies and a mix of window sizes, while the sides show a blend of gabled and hipped roof elements. The overall design blends traditional and modern architectural features, making it suitable for upscale suburban neighborhoods.
description: A spacious two-story house with a multi-hipped roof, prominent balconies, large windows, and an attached garage, finished in dark green and white trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, two columns, a central balcony, and large bay windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the complex roof structure and two small rectangular windows on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary balcony, a side door, and extensive glass-panel walls of the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of window sizes, a sloped roof, and a partially visible patio or deck area.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and mixed window sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with two columns, steps, and a balcony above the main door
